text.title: Modular Monolith Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-modular-monolith.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: spec_id pattern violation; only one module; technical-layer module name (Utils); linter_in_ci false; schema_per_module false; event_bus not in enum; version + date malformed.
